basic_details.job_title: ACEM DRDO Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Research and Development Organisation Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM DRDO) has released the official Paid Internship Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 28 years with a qualification of pursuing Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/IInd year) full-time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute can apply offline on or before 15 June 2026. qualification.details: Pursuing Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/IInd year) full time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Mechanical / Armament Engineering / Defence Technology / Production Engineering etc.

AI&ML / Data Science / System Engineering etc.

selection_process: Merit/Interview/Interaction Shortlisting based on academic record (>=85% or >=8.5 CGPA)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ACEM DRDO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
